'''âdh-y-r''' ('''kadhayar''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:telemark|telemark]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-y-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:telemark|telemark]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âdh-y-r
|-
! Lemma
| kadhayar
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidhayar|thidhayar]] || [[word:jidhayar|jidhayar]] || [[word:shidhayar|shidhayar]] || [[word:kidhayar|kidhayar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudhayar|thuthudhayar]] || [[word:jujudhayar|jujudhayar]] || [[word:shushudhayar|shushudhayar]] || [[word:kukudhayar|kukudhayar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudhayar|thudhayar]] || [[word:judhayar|judhayar]] || [[word:shudhayar|shudhayar]] || [[word:kudhayar|kudhayar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudhayar|thudhayar]] || [[word:judhayar|judhayar]] || [[word:shudhayar|shudhayar]] || [[word:kudhayar|kudhayar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedhayar|thedhayar]] || [[word:jedhayar|jedhayar]] || [[word:shedhayar|shedhayar]] || [[word:kedhayar|kedhayar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodhayar|thothodhayar]] || [[word:jojodhayar|jojodhayar]] || [[word:shoshodhayar|shoshodhayar]] || [[word:kokodhayar|kokodhayar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodhayar|thodhayar]] || [[word:jodhayar|jodhayar]] || [[word:shodhayar|shodhayar]] || [[word:kodhayar|kodhayar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodhayar|thodhayar]] || [[word:jodhayar|jodhayar]] || [[word:shodhayar|shodhayar]] || [[word:kodhayar|kodhayar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠdhayar|thĂŠdhayar]] || [[word:jĂŠdhayar|jĂŠdhayar]] || [[word:shĂŠdhayar|shĂŠdhayar]] || [[word:kĂŠdhayar|kĂŠdhayar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadhayar|thathadhayar]] || [[word:jajadhayar|jajadhayar]] || [[word:shashadhayar|shashadhayar]] || [[word:kakadhayar|kakadhayar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadhayar|thadhayar]] || [[word:jadhayar|jadhayar]] || [[word:shadhayar|shadhayar]] || [[word:kadhayar|kadhayar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadhayar|thadhayar]] || [[word:jadhayar|jadhayar]] || [[word:shadhayar|shadhayar]] || [[word:kadhayar|kadhayar]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shadhayar|shadhayar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshadhayar|goshadhayar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishadhayar|gokishadhayar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shadhayarnĂŒ|shadhayarnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshadhayarnknĂŒ|goshadhayarnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhayarnĂŒ|gokishadhayarnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shadhayarshĂ«|shadhayarshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshadhayarnkshĂ«|goshadhayarnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishadhayarshĂ«|gokishadhayarshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhayaro|shadhayaro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhayarnkro|goshadhayarnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhayaro|gokishadhayaro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhayarmu|shadhayarmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhayarnkmu|goshadhayarnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhayarmu|gokishadhayarmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shadhayarsher|shadhayarsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshadhayarnksher|goshadhayarnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishadhayarsher|gokishadhayarsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shadhayarng|shadhayarng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshadhayarnkng|goshadhayarnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishadhayarng|gokishadhayarng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shadhayarya|shadhayarya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshadhayarnkya|goshadhayarnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishadhayarya|gokishadhayarya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shadhayaryam|shadhayaryam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshadhayarnkyam|goshadhayarnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishadhayaryam|gokishadhayaryam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhayarnĂŒshĂ«|shadhayarnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhayarnknĂŒshĂ«|goshadhayarnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhayarnĂŒshĂ«|gokishadhayarnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhayarnĂŒro|shadhayarnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhayarnknĂŒro|goshadhayarnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhayarnĂŒro|gokishadhayarnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhayarnĂŒmu|shadhayarnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhayarnknĂŒmu|goshadhayarnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhayarnĂŒmu|gokishadhayarnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhayarshĂ«nĂŒ|shadhayarshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhayarnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshadhayarnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhayarshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishadhayarshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhayarshĂ«ro|shadhayarshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhayarnkshĂ«ro|goshadhayarnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhayarshĂ«ro|gokishadhayarshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhayarshĂ«mu|shadhayarshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhayarnkshĂ«mu|goshadhayarnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhayarshĂ«mu|gokishadhayarshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhayaronĂŒ|shadhayaronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhayarnkronĂŒ|goshadhayarnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhayaronĂŒ|gokishadhayaronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhayaroshĂ«|shadhayaroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhayarnkroshĂ«|goshadhayarnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhayaroshĂ«|gokishadhayaroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhayaromu|shadhayaromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhayarnkromu|goshadhayarnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhayaromu|gokishadhayaromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhayarmunĂŒ|shadhayarmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhayarnkmunĂŒ|goshadhayarnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhayarmunĂŒ|gokishadhayarmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhayarmushĂ«|shadhayarmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhayarnkmushĂ«|goshadhayarnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhayarmushĂ«|gokishadhayarmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhayarmuro|shadhayarmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhayarnkmuro|goshadhayarnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhayarmuro|gokishadhayarmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|06f9dc6}}
